entry.title: 银行间市场-利率衍生品
内控指引|法律法规|监管报表|资产负债管理
投资业绩评价及风险管理(VaR in Python)
本币交易梳理02--系统功能介绍
大宗商品|金融期货|期权|策略
利率体系|高频指标|货币政策|财政政策|外汇|债券市场|投资策略
本币交易梳理01--业务与规则

entry.content: /* 鼠标样式 */body { cursor: url(https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/constown/HexoCustomFile/public/cursors/default.cur), default;}a,img {cursor: url(https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/constown/HexoCustomFile/public/cursors/pointer.cur), default;}.search-keyword { background: #ffff1c; color: #003444E6; font-weight: bold;}:root { /* head */ --head-text-color: #333444; --h1-text-color: rgba(0, 52, 68, 0.9); --h5-text-color: var(--theme-primary-color); --h6-text-color: rgba(0, 153, 123, 0.838); --head-prefix-color: #D0D0D0; /* text */ --text-color: #363C42; --text-search-hit-color: rosybrown;}#article-container.post-content { position: static; width: 100%; max-width: 900px; line-height: 1.6; /* padding: 36px 0 70px; */}.table-wrap { overflow: auto; margin: 0px 0 0px;}#article-container p { font-size: 1em; font-family: 'SourceHanSansSC', 'JetBrains Mono', -apple-system, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--text-color); orphans: 4;}#article-container p { display: block; margin-block-start: 1em; margin-block-end: 1em; margin-inline-start: 0px; margin-inline-end: 0px; margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em;}#article-container p { margin: 0px 0 0px;}#article-container.post-content ul,#article-container.post-content ol { margin-block-end: 0em; margin-block-start: 0em;}#article-container img { margin: 0px auto 10px;}.img-alt { margin: -10px 0 0px; color: #858585;}#article-container,ul,li,strong{ color: var(--text-color);}#article-container h1, #article-container h2, #article-container h3, #article-container h4, #article-container h5, #article-container h6 { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; line-height: 2; font-style: normal; break-after: avoid-page; break-inside: avoid; orphans: 4; color: var(--h1-text-color);}#article-container ::after, #article-container ::before { box-sizing: border-box;}#article-container { background: var(--white-color); font-family: 'SourceHanSansSC','JetBrains Mono', -apple-system, sans-serif;}#article-container.post-content h2::before, #article-container.post-content h3::before, #article-container.post-content h4::before, #article-container.post-content h5::before, #article-container.post-content h6::before { position: absolute; right: calc(100% + 10px); top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--head-prefix-color); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: bold; font-variant: 'small-caps'; line-height: 2; padding: 0; border: 0;}#article-container.post-content h1 { font-size: 29.4px; font-weight: 900; text-align: center;}#article-container h1 { position: relative; display: table; margin: 0 auto 20px; }#article-container.post-content h1:after{ content: ''; display: block; position: absolute; border-top: 7px double var(--h1-text-color); height: 3px; width: 100%; /* max-width: 100%; */ left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); margin-bottom: 1rem;}#article-container.post-content h2 { font-size: 23.8px; font-weight: 800;}#article-container.post-content h2::before { content: 'H2';}#article-container.post-content h3 { font-size: 19.6px; font-weight: 800;}#article-container.post-content h3::before { content: 'H3';}#article-container.post-content h4,#article-container.post-content h5,#article-container.post-content h5 { font-size: 16.8px; font-weight: bold;}#article-container.post-content h5 { color: var(--h5-text-color);}#article-container.post-content h6 { color: var(--h6-text-color);}#article-container.post-content h4::before { content: 'H4';}#article-container.post-content h5::before { content: 'H5';}#article-container.post-content h6::before { content: 'H6';}.fancybox__container { --fancybox-bg: #ffffff;}/* ...existing code... *//* 列表缩进与 forest 风格对齐 */#article-container ul,{ margin: 0; padding-left: 4.6em;} /* #article-container.post-content ul ul,#article-container.post-content ol ol,#article-container.post-content ul ol,#article-container.post-content ol ul { margin: 0; padding-left: 1.6em;}#article-container.post-content li { margin: 0; line-height: 1.6;} *//* ...existing code... *//* 无序列表：多级圆点样式，照 forest 设置 */#article-container.post-content ul { list-style-type: circle; /* 第一层也改成空心圆 */ /* padding-left: 1.6em; */}#article-container.post-content ul > li > ul > li { list-style-type: circle;}#article-container.post-content ul > li > ul > li > ul > li { list-style-type: disc;}#article-container.post-content ul > li > ul > li > ul > li > ul > li { list-style-type: circle;}#article-container.post-content ul > li > ul > li > ul > li > ul > li > ul > li { list-style-type: disc;}#article-container.post-content ul > li > ul > li > ul > li > ul > li > ul > li > ul > li { list-style-type: circle;}/* 有序列表：1 → a → i，再往下用圆点 */#article-container.post-content ol > li { list-style-type: decimal;}#article-container.post-content ol > li > ol > li { list-style-type: lower-alpha;}#article-container.post-content ol > li > ol > li > ol > li { list-style-type: lower-roman;}#article-container.post-content ol > li > ol > li > ol > li > ol > li { list-style-type: disc;}#article-container.post-content ol > li > ol > li > ol > li > ol > li > ol > li { list-style-type: circle;}

entry.title: 司法考试
entry.content:
三国法：《国际公法》、《国际私法》和《国际经济法》

四大主科：刑诉+民诉+刑法+民法，另：+商法+经济法…行政法与行政诉讼法、民商法

三大程序法：民诉+刑诉+行诉

24司法考试——刑法，柏浪涛

债券的久期-凸性

投资业绩评价
